title: IF Statement to check if a date is within a particular range
excerpt: I’m trying to make an If statement that shows true when the start and end date columns are within that range, but I can’t get it to work.  Before I go and make a complicated formula, I wanted to see if I could get a simp…

posts.author: weslby (Wesley)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to make an If statement that shows true when the start and end date columns are within that range, but I can’t get it to work. Before I go and make a complicated formula, I wanted to see if I could get a simple formula to work. So, I made the formula: “Today() < {End}”. No matter what I do, I cannot get the correct dates to show as True. Thoughts?
